nasb.text: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and in various places there will be famines and earthquakes.

esv.text: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in various places.

cnv.text: 一個民族要起來攻打另一個民族，一個國家要起來攻打另一個國家，到處都有饑荒和地震，

ccb.text: 民族将与民族互斗，国家将与国家相争，各处将有饥荒和地震。

csbs.text: 一个民族要起来反对另一个民族，一个国家要起来反对另一个国家；到处都会有饥荒和地震。
